description: Query a device's telemetry history (covers `neomind device history` — the time-series read path)

turns.user: Show me sensor-001's telemetry history for the last 24 hours.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent invokes `neomind device history sensor-001 --time-range 24h` (or GET /api/devices/sensor-001/telemetry)
expectations.overall: Must actually query the history and reference the values.battery metric
